name: bifocals-gnome-extension
description: Gnome extension adding more window management keyboard shortcuts

scripts.copy-files: copyfiles schemas/** dist && copyfiles metadata.json dist && copyfiles LICENSE dist
scripts.zip: cd dist && zip -r bifocals.zip . && mv bifocals.zip ..
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run compile-schemas && npm run copy-files && npm run zip
